caption: A hearing takes place in a professional setting featuring a presentation screen and several individuals. On the left, a woman in a dark blazer and patterned top holds a tablet. A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, gestures with his hands while speaking. To his right, another man in a grey vest and white shirt sits facing the screen. The screen displays a graph with ascending blue and red lines. A white and green banner at the bottom of the frames includes the "ORCA" logo and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". Across the frames, the man in the suit continues to gesture and speak, and the camera angle shifts slightly, moving from a wider shot to a tighter focus on the attendees.
